# WindowSpec.AutoSizeWidth property

Content-size the window WIDTH to its body instead of fixing it to [`DefaultRect`](./DefaultRect.md).Width. Only safe for windows without wrapping text (e.g. the launcher's fixed-width icon tiles) — the in-world clip bug that forced fixed width was a wrapping-text problem the launcher does not have. Defaults false.

```csharp
public bool AutoSizeWidth { get; set; }
```
